---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for FOCUS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature.

## Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scientific Impact

Does this affect measurement accuracy, calibration, or scoring? If so, how?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
